name: linux-hyprland
description: Skills for building custom desktop shells on Hyprland using Quickshell, Qt6, and QML.

interface.shortDescription: Quickshell and Hyprland shell development guidance
interface.longDescription: Specialized skill support for building, reviewing, and debugging Quickshell-based desktop shells on Hyprland, including QML patterns, module APIs, visual effects, and reference implementations.
defaultPrompt: Help me build a Quickshell panel for Hyprland.
Review this QML for Quickshell-specific mistakes.
Show the right multi-monitor pattern for a Hyprland bar.
